ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" INTEGER /* Type of the device (foreign key to device_types) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the device (foreign key to locations) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check or update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the log belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the traffic (foreign key to traffic_directions) */,
  "packet_rate" REAL /* Packet rate in packets per second */,
  "mbit" REAL /* Throughput in megabits per second */,
  "mbit_with_framing" REAL /* Throughput with framing in megabits per second */,
  "total_packets" INTEGER /* Total number of packets */,
  "total_bytes" INTEGER /* Total number of bytes */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the traffic */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the traffic */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Network jitter */,
  "latency" REAL /* Network latency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_logs_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES traffic_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (foreign key to user_roles) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the account is locked */,
  "last_password_reset_request" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password reset request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" INTEGER /* Type of the alert (foreign key to alert_types) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (foreign key to alert_status) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type") REFERENCES alert_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES alert_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" INTEGER /* Type of the report (foreign key to report_types) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report data */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report data */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, MB) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_critical_threshold" REAL /* Critical threshold for the metric */,
  "metric_warning_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the maintenance record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
